item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Have you lost all your unforgettable pictures from SD card due to unintentionally format? No need to panic just take a look at www.driverecoverysoftware.org refers to Software for Card Recovery that support recovery of missing information from memory card of all major brands including Nikon, Toshiba etc. folder restoration program retrieves multimedia files from virus corrupted, formatted memory card storage devices.
[read more]

(Utilities)

No need to panic just take a look at www.driverecoverysoftware.org refers to Software for Card Recovery that support recovery of missing information from memory card of all major brands including Nikon, Toshiba etc. folder restoration program retrieves multimedia files from virus corrupted, formatted memory card storage devices.
[read more]

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

[read more]

item.title: Softaken Upgrade PST tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken Upgrade PST tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: softaken-tools
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken Upgrade PST tool
(Utilities)
Download the Softaken Upgrade PST tool to upgrade PST ANSI to UNICODE effortlessly. You can effortlessly upgrade your PST ANSI to a New UNICODE PST file. This tool has a user-friendly interface, with the help of this tool you can upgrade PST file size from 2GB to unlimited. You can export old ANSI Outlook editions to New Unicode. A user with non–technical skills can smoothly utilize its functions. you can easily work with this tool at home as well as in the office freely. You can upgrade your Outlook PST. This software maintains your originality of upgraded PST files. This software has multiple features which we have discussed below. With the help of this tool, you can export ANSI to UNICODE PST. This tool supports all Outlook editions. You don’t require any Outlook installation to work with this tool. Upgrade Outlook PST for limitless storage. Thus it saves you time during the upgrade. Moreover, it will scan your entire upgraded file.
[read more]
item.description:
Softaken Upgrade PST tool

A user with non–technical skills can smoothly utilize its functions. you can easily work with this tool at home as well as in the office freely. You can upgrade your Outlook PST. This software maintains your originality of upgraded PST files. This software has multiple features which we have discussed below. With the help of this tool, you can export ANSI to UNICODE PST. This tool supports all Outlook editions. You don’t require any Outlook installation to work with this tool. Upgrade Outlook PST for limitless storage. Thus it saves you time during the upgrade. Moreover, it will scan your entire upgraded file.
[read more]

Download the Softaken Upgrade PST tool to upgrade PST ANSI to UNICODE effortlessly. You can effortlessly upgrade your PST ANSI to a New UNICODE PST file. This tool has a user-friendly interface, with the help of this tool you can upgrade PST file size from 2GB to unlimited. You can export old ANSI Outlook editions to New Unicode. A user with non–technical skills can smoothly utilize its functions. you can easily work with this tool at home as well as in the office freely. You can upgrade your Outlook PST. This software maintains your originality of upgraded PST files. This software has multiple features which we have discussed below. With the help of this tool, you can export ANSI to UNICODE PST. This tool supports all Outlook editions. You don’t require any Outlook installation to work with this tool. Upgrade Outlook PST for limitless storage. Thus it saves you time during the upgrade. Moreover, it will scan your entire upgraded file.

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]




"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
[read more]

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. item.title: Recover Pen Drive Data Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Pen Drive Data Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Pen Drive Data Software
(Utilities)
Easily installable Recover Pen Drive Data software restores misplaced digital snaps, audio, video clippings, text, files, document files etc from USB storage devices including compact flash memory, thumb drive, jump drive, memory stick etc. Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download pen drive recovery software for data restoration without any expert’s help. Windows USB pen drive recovery tool retrieves missing files and folders from all storage devices having different capacity.

[read more]

(Utilities)

Windows USB pen drive recovery tool retrieves missing files and folders from all storage devices having different capacity.

[read more]

item.title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:title: Speed Dreams [Racing]
item.itunes:author: leillo1975
item.itunes:summary:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]
item.description:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Speed Dreams
(Racing)
Speed Dreams is a Motorsport Simulator featuring high-quality 3D graphics and an accurate physics engine, all targeting maximum realism. Initially forked from TORCS, it has now reached a clearly higher realism level in visual and physics simulation, thanks to its active development team and growing community. It mainly aims to implement exciting new features, cars, tracks and AI opponents to make a more enjoyable game for the player, while constantly pushing forward visual and physics realism. It is also intended for any research, study or teaching activity, around physics and AI, thanks to its GPL V2+ license, and the clear and modular architecture of its C/C++ code base:
https://www.speed-dreams.net

[read more]

item.title: Digital Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How to restore missing wedding snaps? Don’t worry! Just use professional Digital Picture Recovery Software from www.driverecoverysoftware.org to salvage important pictures, digital birthday photos and other media files from formatted mass storage media. Technically sound lost image recovery program is fully equipped with advanced disk scanning mechanism to find and restore all lost files from inaccessible media drive as per user requirements.
[read more]

Technically sound lost image recovery program is fully equipped with advanced disk scanning mechanism to find and restore all lost files from inaccessible media drive as per user requirements.
[read more]

Technically sound lost image recovery program is fully equipped with advanced disk scanning mechanism to find and restore all lost files from inaccessible media drive as per user requirements.

item.title: png2svgz Icontheme Scelett builder for KDE44 and Plasma [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: png2svgz Icontheme Scelett builder for KDE44 and Plasma [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: Blackcrack
item.itunes:summary:
png2svgz Icontheme Scelett builder for KDE44 and Plasma
(Developers Apps)
2023.10.03-21-38 update the code
The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg ..
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)
Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
item.description:
png2svgz Icontheme Scelett builder for KDE44 and Plasma
(Developers Apps)
2023.10.03-21-38 update the code
The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg ..
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)
Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
png2svgz Icontheme Scelett builder for KDE44 and Plasma
(Developers Apps)
2023.10.03-21-38 update the code
The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg ..
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)
Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
